name: Managed Hyperscaler Services
description: Rundum gemanagte AWS, Azure und GCP Umgebungen mit Well-Architected Reviews, Security Assessments, standardisierten Landing-Zone-Modulen und 24/7 Operations — als zertifizierter MSP Partner auf allen hyperscaler Plattformen.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Lists services (reviews, assessments, landing zones, operations) but does not articulate the business outcome — e.g., reduced risk, faster time-to-cloud, cost optimization.
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
'zertifizierter MSP Partner auf allen hyperscaler Plattformen' — which certifications? Naming them would strengthen the claim.
